title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on City Union Bank Limited
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated May 20, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹10.10 lakh (Rupees Ten Lakh Ten Thousand only) on City Union Bank Limited (the bank) for non-compliance with certain provisions of directions issued by RBI on ‘Priority Sector Loan accounts’ and ‘Reporting of Self Help Group (SHG) member level data to Credit Information Companies (CICs)’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the p
